name: single_partition_filter
sql: SELECT id, value FROM axon_table WHERE category = 'C' ORDER BY id

name: multi_partition_filter
sql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM axon_table WHERE category IN ('A', 'B') GROUP BY category ORDER BY category

name: no_match_partition_filter
sql: SELECT id FROM axon_table WHERE category = 'Z' ORDER BY id

name: aggregate_all_partitions
sql: SELECT SUM(value) AS total_value FROM axon_table

name: stats_prune_not_full
sql: SELECT id FROM axon_table WHERE value >= 40 ORDER BY id
